summary: The actual screenshot shows a close but not perfect match to the wireframe, with differences in text content, panel layout, resource display, and minor visual elements. The wireframe is partially suitable for validation but lacks detail on dynamic behaviors.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Dark starfield/game-map background
correctElements.evidence: Both actual and wireframe feature a dark background with starfield and map elements.

correctElements.requirement: Screen description: In-game map with system orbit, stellar body, region marker, and lane mouth
correctElements.evidence: Systems like Sirius, Arcturus, Canopus are present with orbits and connections in both.

correctElements.requirement: Screen description: right-side Map Key panel docked under the selection panel area. Legend rows show system orbit, stellar body, region marker, and lane mouth
correctElements.evidence: Map Key panel is on the right with legend items matching the description.

correctElements.requirement: FR-UI-SCREEN-GAMEPLAY-HUD-LEGEND: The Gameplay HUD legend screen must visually satisfy the documented screen description
correctElements.evidence: Top bar with turn, phase, and active player info is present in both.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: terminal-style labels
correctElements.evidence: POP, MET, FUEL labels are present in a terminal-style format.

incorrectElements.requirement: FR-UI-SCREEN-GAMEPLAY-HUD-LEGEND: Visually satisfy the documented screen description and expected user-facing UI behavior
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: The phase displayed differs, which may indicate a mismatch in game state or incorrect wireframe representation.

incorrectElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: simple rectangles for controls, terminal-style labels
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Actual includes increment values not present in wireframe, affecting visual match and potentially indicating dynamic elements not captured.

incorrectElements.requirement: Screen description: right-side Map Key panel docked under the selection panel area
incorrectElements.actual: No visible separate selection panel; Map Key appears standalone
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Missing selection panel in actual screenshot, which is present in wireframe, suggesting docking or visibility issue.

incorrectElements.requirement: TR-UI-AUDIT-HWND-001: The actual screenshot must be captured from the RiskyStars client HWND
incorrectElements.expected: Panels F1 Dbg:On F2 Cmd:Off F3 AI:Off F4 UI:Off F5 Ref:Off F6 Tut:Off H Help
incorrectElements.actual: Planets F1 Dbg:On F2 Cmd:Off F3 AI:Off F4 UI:Off F5 Ref:Off F6 Tut:Off H Help (partial match)
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Slight text difference ('Planets' vs 'Panels'), possibly indicating version or state mismatch.

incorrectElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: fixed screen-relative geometry
incorrectElements.actual: top=107 labels at bottom left and right
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Extra debug labels in actual not in wireframe, and wireframe has its own baseline label not expected in actual.

incorrectElements.requirement: Screen description: Legend rows show system orbit, stellar body, region marker, and lane mouth
incorrectElements.expected: Detailed icons in systems like multiple planets in Sirius
incorrectElements.actual: Simpler icons and fewer details in system representations
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Visual details in map elements do not fully match, potentially due to rendering differences or incomplete wireframe.

incorrectElements.requirement: FR-UI-AUDIT-001: Every documented UI screen must have a direct prompt-rendered wireframe for screenshot comparison
incorrectElements.actual: Close visual match but with noted differences
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Residual risk from potential DPI/scaling or anti-aliasing differences not detectable in image comparison.

wireframeSuitability.why: The wireframe captures the overall layout and key elements but lacks representation of dynamic content like resource increments and selection states, and does not fully align with repository process requirements for verification as per AGENTS-README-FIRST.yaml.
missingRequirements: Dynamic UI behavior validation (e.g., selection panel visibility)
Exact color and icon matching for legend symbols
Integration with repository tools for automated verification as suggested in agentsReadmeFirstContent
recommendedWireframeChanges: Include variations for different game phases and states
Ensure wireframe includes all possible debug overlays or make them optional
